personal.title: BICT Undergraduate | Full-Stack Developer | OCI Certified
personal.heroTitle: I build software that works as good as it looks.
personal.heroSubtitle: I'm Buddhika Darshan — a final-year engineer who turns complex problems into clean, scalable, and impactful software.

about.profile: I am a Full-Stack Software Engineer and BICT undergraduate specializing in building scalable, AI-integrated applications. From architecting agentic IoT smart environments to developing semantic search engines, I bridge the gap between robust backend systems (Java/Spring Boot, Node.js) and intuitive, modern frontends (React, Flutter). Driven by a passion for clean code and cloud-ready infrastructure (GCP, Oracle Cloud), I thrive on solving complex system architecture challenges.
highlights: 🎓 Final Year BICT at University of Ruhuna
🤖 Built HomeCanvas (Gemini AI, ESP32, Spring Boot)
🚀 Deployed via GCP, Docker, Vercel & Netlify

projects.title: HomeCanvas
projects.description: An end-to-end smart home platform integrating an ESP32 micro-controller and sensor fusion for real-time home monitoring. Architected with a robust Spring Boot backend handling high-frequency sensor telemetry via MQTT, and a React-based interactive dashboard that provides real-time visualizations and actionable alerts. Deployed on scalable cloud infrastructure with automated CI/CD pipelines.

projects.title: CrowdFlow
projects.description: A map-first Android platform backed by a highly scalable Node.js data pipeline. Empowers users to visualize localized traffic conditions, integrating Google Maps SDK and geospatial queries to identify congestion hotspots. Features a custom Redis-backed debouncing layer capable of processing thousands of concurrent user-submitted severity reports, significantly reducing database load.

projects.title: BoutiqueFlow
projects.description: A full-stack digital management platform built to transition physical retail businesses online. Includes secure real-time inventory tracking, Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) for staff management, and seamless Stripe/PayPal integration for automated sales processing. Designed with a microservice-inspired architecture ensuring high availability during seasonal traffic spikes.

projects.title: Cypher-UI
projects.description: An educational platform bridging theoretical cryptography with hands-on implementation. Features highly interactive, real-time visualizers for algorithms like AES, RSA, and DES. Includes advanced brute-force simulators and step-by-step cryptographic transformations, built with a robust TypeScript engine validated by over 95% Jest test coverage.

projects.title: Smart Campus
projects.description: A production-grade, multi-role Flutter application that digitizes and centralizes administrative and academic workflows. Designed with a resilient offline-first architecture utilizing SQLite, ensuring 100% core functionality in low-connectivity environments. Implements Clean Architecture principles and Provider state management for maintainable and scalable code.

projects.title: Earn++
projects.description: A cross-platform mobile application providing beginner investors with a streamlined, dollar-based alternative to complex spreadsheet portfolio management. Leverages Dart Shelf for the backend to synchronize real-time profit/loss calculations and portfolio metrics, delivering an intuitive UI focused on frictionless asset tracking.

projects.title: Secure Vault
projects.description: A secure desktop utility built with JavaFX and Java, designed to manage, organize, and edit .env files across multiple local development environments. Employs AES-256 encryption to protect sensitive credentials at rest, featuring automated encrypted backup generation and a clean, developer-focused interface.
